title: Create B40-B48 Placeholder Prompts
summary: Created 9 functional placeholder prompts for internal meeting blocks (B40-B48)

artifacts.description: Extract and document strategic decisions made during internal meetings
Document team alignment, role clarifications, and coordination agreements
Extract internal action items that don't require external coordination
Document resource allocation decisions, capacity planning, and workload distribution
Extract process improvement opportunities and workflow optimizations
Document team dynamics, communication patterns, and cultural signals
Document knowledge sharing, learning moments, and institutional knowledge
Document ongoing strategic debates, unresolved discussions, and strategic tensions
Synthesize strategic insights, organizational intelligence, and high-level themes

approach: Analyzed existing B01 and B05 prompts to understand format and structure. Created 9 functional prompts with proper YAML frontmatter, clear purposes, input/output formats, and structured templates. Each prompt focuses on a specific aspect of internal meeting intelligence.
